chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3521 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For haring of main case. 28.08.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz Teevino, advocate for the petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, Addl. P.G along with SIP / I.O Ayaz Hussain, PS Naushahro Feroz and SIP Muhammad Jameel, PS Zaman Town. ------------- I.O is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of Mst. Kori / petitioner No.1 and on the basis of that statement he undertakes to file report in “C” Class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending application, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
